issue_title: fix(combobox): stop updating input if there is no selection
issue_body_preview:
The previous fix in the combobox broke the lookup and the input is clear every time they type. I have change the logic to only update the value if there is a selection and I have create a unit test.

I've also replace toHaveCssClass with toHaveClass. I'm not sure where toHaveCssClass come from but
test_description_zh: 在 combobox（lookup 模式）组件中，点击输入框并手动输入文字，观察输入框中的文字是否能正常保留并持续输入。
expected_result_zh: 用户在 combobox lookup 输入框中键入文字时，输入内容应正常显示并保留，不会在每次输入时被自动清空；只有在用户明确选择了某个下拉选项后，输入框的值才会被更新为所选项的内容。
